title: EUR/CNY: Why China’s Yuan Is Drawing Scrutiny in Europe, What It Means for Euro
title_cn: 欧元/人民币：为何人民币在欧洲受到关注，这对欧元意味着什么
summary: The value of the yuan has become a flashpoint in trade relations between China and the European Union. Many EU policymakers and economists believe the currency is undervalued and a key driver of the bloc’s deepening trade deficit with the East Asian nation. That imbalance averaged about $1.1 billion a day in June.

title: Asian Stocks Advance on Tech Rally, Yen Weakens: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 亚洲股市因科技股上涨而上涨，日元走弱：市场总结
summary: Stocks in Asia climbed for a second day as a rebound in chipmakers at the heart of the artificial intelligence boom offset concerns over rising oil prices after the renewed escalation in the US-Iran conflict.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 22
title_cn: 7 月 22 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil edged higher after President Donald Trump played down the prospect of near-term talks with Iran while threatening broader strikes, as risks to global supply spread beyond the Middle East to the Black Sea.

title: Gold Holds Gain as Traders Weigh Impact of Oil Risks on Rates
title_cn: 交易员权衡石油风险对利率的影响，黄金保持上涨
summary: Gold held a gain as traders monitored threats to energy supply routes that risk stoking inflation and putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to hike interest rates.

title: Yen Slides Past 163 Mark to Fresh Four-Decade Low Against Dollar
title_cn: 日元兑美元汇率跌破163关口，创四年新低
summary: The yen slid past 163 per dollar for the first time since 1986, extending its decline and increasingly testing Japanese authorities’ resolve to intervene.

title: Innolight Seeks Up to $7 Billion in Biggest Hong Kong Listing in Years
title_cn: 旭创科技寻求筹集高达 70 亿美元的资金，进行多年来最大规模的香港上市
summary: China’s Zhongji Innolight Co. has started taking investor orders for a Hong Kong listing to raise as much as HK$55 billion ($7 billion), the city’s biggest in seven years.

title: KKR Commercial Real Estate Lender Studies Potential Sale, Merger
title_cn: KKR 商业房地产贷款机构研究潜在出售、合并
summary: A commercial real estate lender managed by KKR & Co. said it’s considering strategic alternatives that could include a merger or sale of the money-losing company.

title: Moody’s Lifts Argentina Debt Rating in Fresh Boost to Milei
title_cn: 穆迪提升阿根廷债务评级，再次提升 Milei
summary: Moody’s Ratings upgraded Argentina’s credit score, giving the nation its third sovereign upgrade in less than three months and further validating President Javier Milei’s economic overhaul plan.

title: Banks Wrap Up Loan Backing SoftBank’s $5.4 Billion Robotics Bet
title_cn: 银行完成贷款支持软银 54 亿美元的机器人赌注
summary: A group of banks wrapped up a loan offering backing SoftBank Group Corp.’s $5.4 billion robotics bet after increasing the size of the US dollar tranche.

title: This ETF Tax Loophole Is All the Rage Among Rich Americans
title_cn: ETF税收漏洞在美国富人中风靡一时
summary: A bespoke fund is becoming a must-have tool for wealthy investors looking to defer — and sometimes even avoid — capital gains tax.

title: Bitcoin Rallies After Bessent Says Clarity Act at ‘1-Yard Line’
title_cn: Bessent 表示《澄清法案》处于“1 码线”后比特币上涨
summary: Crypto markets are stirring after months of listless trading on signs that Washington is moving toward a clearer rulebook for digital assets.

title: Alaska Airlines Narrowly Beats Estimates as Fuel Costs Stay High
title_cn: 由于燃油成本居高不下，阿拉斯加航空的业绩略好于预期
summary: Alaska Air Group Inc. earnings outlook slightly beat analyst predictions as the airline grapples with rising fuel prices from the war in the Middle East.

title: High Yielders Pace Emerging-Market Currency Gains, Stocks Jump
title_cn: 高收益债券加速新兴市场货币上涨，股市上涨
summary: Emerging-market currencies were mixed on Tuesday, with high-yielding names outperforming as investors looked past the latest developments in the Middle East and focused on carry trades instead.

title: Stocks Climb as Rebound in Chipmakers Gathers Pace: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着芯片制造商加速反弹，股市上涨：市场总结
summary: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, boosting stocks amid a rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that’s powered the bull market has more room to run.

title: Nasdaq 100 Notches Best Day in Weeks as Chipmakers Rebound
title_cn: 芯片制造商反弹，纳斯达克 100 指数创数周最佳单日表现
summary: The Nasdaq 100 Index posted its best day in three weeks on Tuesday as a rebound in chipmakers at the center of the artificial-intelligence trade overshadowed the re-escalation in the US-Iran war.

title: Capital One Profit Beats Estimates as Loan-Loss Provisions Drop
title_cn: 由于贷款损失拨备下降，第一资本利润超出预期
summary: Capital One Financial Corp., the biggest US credit-card lender, swung to a profit in the second quarter as it set aside less money to cover bad loans than Wall Street had anticipated.

title: Canadian Stocks Climb as Gold Surge Offsets Trump Tariff Threat
title_cn: 黄金飙升抵消特朗普关税威胁，加拿大股市上涨
summary: Canadian stocks climbed Tuesday despite US President Donald Trump threatening 50% tariffs on the country’s exports, thanks to surging gold prices and a rally in tech hardware stocks.

title: US Yields Hit Two-Month High as Oil Sparks Inflation Risk
title_cn: 由于石油引发通胀风险，美国收益率触及两个月高点
summary: US Treasuries fell, pushing 10- and 30-year yields to the highest in about two months, as a surge in oil prices stoked concern that inflationary pressures will prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 21
title_cn: 7 月 21 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Brent oil advanced to the highest since early June as traders weighed threats to maritime traffic that span from the Strait of Hormuz and the Red Sea to a key Kazakh export terminal on Russia’s coast.

title: Gold and Silver Rise on Dip-Buying as Traders Weigh Fed Strategy
title_cn: 交易员权衡美联储策略，黄金和白银因逢低买盘而上涨
summary: Gold and silver advanced on dip-buying as traders monitored Middle East tensions for signs that higher energy costs could stoke inflation, putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to tighten policy.

title: OpenAI Says Its AI Models Breached Startup Hugging Face’s System
title_cn: OpenAI 称其人工智能模型违反了初创公司 Hugging Face 的系统
summary: OpenAI said some of its artificial intelligence models inadvertently compromised the internal systems of the startup Hugging Face Inc. in what AI developer described as an “unprecedented cyber incident.”

title: Newborn Town Targets Global Viewers With AI-Made Short Dramas
title_cn: 《新生小镇》以人工智能短剧吸引全球观众
summary: Chinese social networking and entertainment provider Newborn Town Inc. is doubling down on artificial intelligence to create short dramas in a bet the technology can slash costs while fueling growth across emerging markets.

title: Robinhood Prediction Market Revenue to Top Crypto: Analysts
title_cn: Robinhood 预测加密货币市场收入最高：分析师
summary: Trading platform Robinhood Markets Inc.’s revenue from prediction market is set to overshadow that from cryptocurrency trading, starting as soon as the second quarter, analysts at Bernstein and Piper Sandler said this week.

title: Nintendo Scores Hit With Tomodachi Life as Gamers Seek Escape With Life Sims
title_cn: 任天堂《Tomodachi Life》大获成功，玩家纷纷通过《Life Sims》寻求逃离
summary: Six years after Nintendo Co.’s Animal Crossing: New Horizons became a lockdown phenomenon, the company is scoring another major hit worldwide from gamers seeking an escape from rising anxiety and isolation.

title: Super Micro Jumps After Early Results Show Rising Backlog
title_cn: 早期结果显示积压不断增加，超微跳跃
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. shares rose about 15% in extended trading after the server maker issued preliminary results saying its backlog hit a record on new orders in the quarter of more than $60 billion.

title: Intel Rallies on Plans for Headcount Reductions
title_cn: 英特尔因裁员计划而集会
summary: Intel Corp. shares rallied Tuesday after the company confirmed it will cut more jobs to reduce costs and shake up its key data center unit.

title: OpenAI Names BNY, Nubank CEOs to Board Ahead of IPO
title_cn: OpenAI 任命 BNY 和 Nubank 首席执行官在 IPO 前加入董事会
summary: OpenAI has appointed two financial services executives to its board of directors, drawing on their experience as the company moves toward a Wall Street debut.

title: Amazon’s Portal for Business Nears $60 Billion in Revenue
title_cn: 亚马逊商业门户收入接近 600 亿美元
summary: Amazon.com Inc.’s business sales unit was recently on track to sell $60 billion of merchandise over the course of a full year, up about 71% from 2023, evidence that the world’s largest online retailer is gaining ground in corporate sales.

title: Tesla’s Problem Is Opposite of Big Tech: Not Enough AI Spending
title_cn: 特斯拉的问题与大型科技公司相反：人工智能支出不足
summary: After hearing Tesla Inc.’s seemingly countless promises about artificial intelligence, autonomous driving and robotics, Wall Street wants the company to start putting its money where its mouth is.

title: France Passes Bill to Ban Social Media for Children Under 15
title_cn: 法国通过法案禁止 15 岁以下儿童使用社交媒体
summary: France passed legislation to restrict the use of social media for children under 15 years old, becoming the first major European country to do so in a move that may strain relations with US technology companies and President Donald Trump.

title: Nvidia Touts Progress Getting New Rubin Design to Customers
title_cn: Nvidia 向客户宣传新 Rubin 设计的进展
summary: Nvidia Corp., the semiconductor company at the heart of the artificial intelligence boom, said its latest chip designs are making their way to customers and will help solidify the chipmaker’s leadership in the industry.

title: OpenAI’s Altman to Brief US Officials on Next Wave of AI Models
title_cn: OpenAI 的 Altman 将向美国官员介绍下一波人工智能模型
summary: OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman plans to brief the Trump administration and US lawmakers next week on the upcoming generation of artificial intelligence models as the US works to create a process to review the safety of cutting-edge AI systems, according to a senior company executive.

title: Apple to Launch ‘Upgrade’ Device Leasing Program With Klarna to Spur Sales
title_cn: 苹果将​​与 Klarna 合作推出“升级”设备租赁计划以刺激销售
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing to introduce Apple Upgrade, a leasing program that will mark one of the biggest-ever changes to how the company sells devices.

title: China’s Moonshot in Talks on Pre-IPO Funds at $50 Billion Value
title_cn: 中国在价值 500 亿美元的 Pre-IPO 基金谈判中的登月计划
summary: Moonshot AI is preparing to begin discussions in August on a final round of fundraising before listing in Hong Kong, capitalizing on the excitement around its latest model to raise capital at a valuation of as much as $50 billion.

title: Z.AI to Use Only Chinese AI Chips at New Giant Data Center
title_cn: Z.AI将在新巨型数据中心仅使用中国AI芯片
summary: Z.AI has completed construction of a major data center that it plans to fill only with Chinese-made chips, a step forward in Beijing’s efforts to shift away from restricted Nvidia Corp. silicon for future AI development.

title: Google Expands in Miami After Its Billionaire Founders Buy Homes
title_cn: 谷歌在其亿万富翁创始人购买房屋后在迈阿密扩张
summary: Alphabet Inc., has more than quadrupled its office space in Miami this year shortly after co-founders Larry Page and Sergey Brin bought homes in the area.

title: Bessent Says US to Scrutinize Chinese AI Models for IP Theft
title_cn: Bessent 称美国将审查中国人工智能模型是否盗窃知识产权
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US will carefully examine open source artificial intelligence models from China for signs of intellectual property theft, amid concerns that a new wave of lower-cost Chinese competitors may sweep aside the top American models.

title: $100 Million Bet on Venezuelan Fintech Cashea Draws Global Investors
title_cn: 委内瑞拉金融科技 Cashea 投资 1 亿美元吸引全球投资者
summary: Cashea, Venezuela’s largest financial technology company, has raised $100 million across two financing rounds, as global investors bet it can grow in a market where lending has been constrained for years.

title: OpenAI’s Agents Reach 10 Million Users After ChatGPT Work Debut
title_cn: ChatGPT 上线后 OpenAI 代理已覆盖 1000 万用户
summary: OpenAI has seen a sharp uptick in demand for its artificial intelligence agents since its recent release of ChatGPT Work, providing new momentum in its bid to keep pace with rival Anthropic PBC.

title: Garmin Debuts $200 Screenless Fitness Band in Challenge to Whoop
title_cn: Garmin 推出售价 200 美元的无屏健身手环，挑战 Whoop
summary: Garmin Ltd. introduced a $200 screenless fitness tracker, becoming the latest company to enter a segment popularized by Whoop Inc.

title: Trump Sets 100% Tariff on Generic Drugs With Two-Year Delay
title_cn: 特朗普推迟两年对仿制药征收 100% 关税
summary: Generic drug manufacturers will have two years to move production to the US or face a 100% import duty from August 2028, President Donald Trump said in a social media post Tuesday.

title: Trump Plays Down Prospects of Iran Talks Amid Red Sea Threat
title_cn: 特朗普在红海威胁中淡化伊朗谈判的前景
summary: President Donald Trump minimized the prospect of immediate talks with Iran as the two sides exchanged strikes and Houthi militants in Yemen threatened shipping in the Red Sea.

title: Modi’s Protectionism Push Creates Stock Winners in Laggard India
title_cn: 莫迪的保护主义推动为落后的印度创造了股市赢家
summary: India’s renewed push to replace critical imports with locally manufactured products is creating a new cohort of stock market winners.

title: Trump Nominates Telecom Lawyer to Lead DOJ’s Antitrust Unit
title_cn: 特朗普提名电信律师领导司法部反垄断部门
summary: President Donald Trump nominated Adam Candeub, the general counsel at the Federal Communications Commission, as an assistant attorney general at the US Justice Department, according to an announcement from the White House.

title: Canada-US Bridge Opening Ceremony Called Off After Trump Tariff
title_cn: 特朗普关税后加美大桥开通仪式被取消
summary: Canada said it would no longer hold a celebratory event with the US for the opening of the new bridge connecting Detroit to Windsor, Ontario, after President Donald Trump promised new 50% tariffs against Canadian goods.

title: Trump Loses Bid to Block BBC Subpoenas in $10 Billion Suit
title_cn: 特朗普在 100 亿美元诉讼中败诉阻止 BBC 传票
summary: A judge denied President Donald Trump’s attempt to block dozens of subpoenas sent to members of his inner circle by the British Broadcasting Corp. as part of its defense against his $10 billion defamation lawsuit.

title: Hegseth Says US War Against Iran Has Cost $37.5 Billion
title_cn: 赫格斯称美国对伊朗的战争已花费 375 亿美元
summary: The US war against Iran has cost the US about $37.5 billion, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said, giving the most up-to-date official estimate for a conflict that shows no signs of ending soon.

title: Trump Lifts Four-Decade Ban on Direct US Flights to Lebanon
title_cn: 特朗普解除了长达四年的美国直飞黎巴嫩航班的禁令
summary: President Donald Trump said his administration would move to allow US air carriers to resume flying directly to Lebanon, lifting restrictions that have been in place for more than four decades.

title: NJ Blames Software for Registering 6,600 Noncitizens to Vote
title_cn: 新泽西州指责软件登记 6,600 名非公民投票
summary: New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill said about 6,600 people who identified themselves as noncitizens were registered to vote between June 2023 and June 2024 due to a software error in the state’s motor vehicle system.

title: Dartmouth Medical School Is Latest Trump Civil Rights Target
title_cn: 达特茅斯医学院是特朗普最新的民权目标
summary: The Trump administration said Tuesday it has launched civil rights investigations into alleged racial discrimination in admissions at five medical schools, including at Dartmouth College.

title: Senators Question ‘Insider’ Access to Trump Truth Social Posts
title_cn: 参议员质疑“内部人士”获取特朗普真相的社交帖子
summary: Senators in both parties are questioning a plan by President Donald Trump’s media company to sell real-time access to Truth Social posts to Wall Street firms.

title: Zelenskyy Ousts Army Chief Syrskyi After Nationwide Protests
title_cn: 泽连斯基在全国抗议后罢免陆军参谋长西尔斯基
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy dismissed Armed Forces commander-in-chief Oleksandr Syrskyi after nationwide protests calling for the top soldier’s ouster.

title: Trump’s Election Demands Get Test in Arizona Primary Races
title_cn: 特朗普的选举要求在亚利桑那州初选中得到考验
summary: President Donald Trump wants GOP lawmakers to back his plan to scrutinize the November midterm elections, echoing unfounded complaints he still makes about his 2020 defeat. Arizona’s primaries on Tuesday are the first test of whether that message is energizing Republican voters.

title: Arizona Primary Races Will Test Trump’s Election Fraud Claims
title_cn: 亚利桑那州初选将考验特朗普的选举舞弊指控
summary: The president has several allies on the ballot who are seeking positions where they could oversee or influence future elections.

title: Trump Pauses $1 Billion in Medicaid Funds From Two States
title_cn: 特朗普暂停向两个州提供 10 亿美元医疗补助资金
summary: The Trump administration will withhold more than $1 billion in Medicaid payments to California and Minnesota after an audit indicated instances of fraud in the federal health program.

title: US Plans New Tariffs on Dozens of Economies as Temporary Duties Expire
title_cn: 临时关税到期后，美国计划对数十个经济体征收新关税
summary: President Donald Trump is poised to impose fresh levies on products from dozens of economies by Friday, according to people familiar with the matter, a move to ensure his tariff regime remains intact even after stopgap 10% global duties lapse.

title: Israel Withdraws Troops From Lebanon Towns in Test of Truce
title_cn: 以色列从黎巴嫩城镇撤军以测试停战
summary: Israeli troops have withdrawn from parts of southern Lebanon under a US-mediated ceasefire agreement, which aims to keep Iran-backed Hezbollah away from the Israeli border and end nearly five months of conflict.

title: Burnham Approves Use of UK Bases for Some US Strikes on Iran
title_cn: 伯纳姆批准美国对伊朗的部分打击使用英国基地
summary: New Prime Minister Andy Burnham has approved the use of British military bases by the US for what the UK calls defensive strikes against Iran, in a continuation of his predecessor Keir Starmer’s policy even as President Donald Trump ramps up his war.

title: France Passes Farm Law as Greens Decry Pesticide Waivers
title_cn: 绿党谴责农药豁免，法国通过农业法
summary: France adopted a sweeping emergency agriculture bill allowing limited exemptions for two pesticides used by struggling farmers, prompting backlash from pro-environment groups, who vowed to challenge the legislation.

title: Finnish Government Survives Confidence Vote Sparked by Lobbying Scandal
title_cn: 芬兰政府在游说丑闻引发的信任投票中幸存
summary: Finland’s coalition government survived a confidence vote in parliament after a political crisis over lobbying erupted.
